title: The Prepared Room
description: An interior held in a state of deliberate preparation, where atmosphere behaves like structure and the room suggests a self being assembled.

learning.technique: Use atmosphere as compositional structure rather than decorative haze.
learning.concept: Constructed selfhood can be implied through staging rather than explicit subject display.
learning.visual: Let prepared objects carry psychological pressure.

artistUpdate.summary: First public-facing study import from the canonical IAMFRANZ workspace.
